


DROP TABLE IF EXISTS [__BSD_StucklistenArticle_VersionValidation];
CREATE TABLE [__BSD_StucklistenArticle_VersionValidation](
Id BIGINT IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY,
[ArticleNr] INT NOT NULL,
[ArticleNumber] NVARCHAR(250) NOT NULL,
[ArticleKundenIndex] NVARCHAR(250) NULL,
[ArticleKundenIndexDatum] DATETIME NULL,
[ArticleBOMVersion] INT NOT NULL,
[ArticleCPVersion] INT NOT NULL,
[BOMValidationDate] DATETIME NOT NULL Default getdate(),
[CPValidationDate] DATETIME NOT NULL Default getdate(),



[EngineeringControl]  BIT NOT NULL Default(0),
[EngineeringControlEditUserId] INT NULL,
[EngineeringControlEditUserName] NVARCHAR(250) NULL,
[EngineeringControlEditUserEmail] NVARCHAR(250) NULL,
[EngineeringControlEditDate] DATETIME NULL,
[EngineeringUpdate]  BIT NOT NULL Default(0),
[EngineeringUpdateEditUserId] INT NULL,
[EngineeringUpdateEditUserName] NVARCHAR(250) NULL,
[EngineeringUpdateEditUserEmail] NVARCHAR(250) NULL,
[EngineeringUpdateEditDate] DATETIME NULL,
[EngineeringPrint]  BIT NOT NULL Default(0),
[EngineeringPrintEditUserId] INT NULL,
[EngineeringPrintEditUserName] NVARCHAR(250) NULL,
[EngineeringPrintEditUserEmail] NVARCHAR(250) NULL,
[EngineeringPrintEditDate] DATETIME NULL,
[EngineeringDistribution]  BIT NOT NULL Default(0),
[EngineeringDistributionEditUserId] INT NULL,
[EngineeringDistributionEditUserName] NVARCHAR(250) NULL,
[EngineeringDistributionEditUserEmail] NVARCHAR(250) NULL,
[EngineeringDistributionEditDate] DATETIME NULL,
[EngineeringValidationFull] BIT NOT NULL Default(0),

[QualityControl]  BIT NOT NULL Default(0),
[QualityControlEditUserId] INT NULL,
[QualityControlEditUserName] NVARCHAR(250) NULL,
[QualityControlEditUserEmail] NVARCHAR(250) NULL,
[QualityControlEditDate] DATETIME NULL,
[QualityUpdate]  BIT NOT NULL Default(0),
[QualityUpdateEditUserId] INT NULL,
[QualityUpdateEditUserName] NVARCHAR(250) NULL,
[QualityUpdateEditUserEmail] NVARCHAR(250) NULL,
[QualityUpdateEditDate] DATETIME NULL,
[QualityPrint]  BIT NOT NULL Default(0),
[QualityPrintEditUserId] INT NULL,
[QualityPrintEditUserName] NVARCHAR(250) NULL,
[QualityPrintEditUserEmail] NVARCHAR(250) NULL,
[QualityPrintEditDate] DATETIME NULL,
[QualityDistribution]  BIT NOT NULL Default(0),
[QualityDistributionEditUserId] INT NULL,
[QualityDistributionEditUserName] NVARCHAR(250) NULL,
[QualityDistributionEditUserEmail] NVARCHAR(250) NULL,
[QualityDistributionEditDate] DATETIME NULL,
[QualityValidationFull] BIT NOT NULL Default(0),

[ValidationFull] BIT NOT NULL Default(0)
);
